features.name: system.sampled with icmp expression argument
features.description: Code should include a sv.system.sampled call that takes a comb.icmp result as its argument, where the icmp compares a register read with a constant value

features.name: comb icmp result passed to system function
features.description: Code should include a combinational icmp operation whose result is passed directly to a system Verilog function that requires an lvalue context
